campaign_promises: Launch the 'A Safer 11 for a Better 11' comprehensive public safety package
Deploy Automated License Plate Reader (ALPR) cameras across CD11
House the CIRCLE Team for unarmed rapid response to non-violent emergencies
Expand mental health and addiction services and LAPD Mental Evaluation Unit
Support gang- and at-risk-youth intervention programs (Helper Foundation)
Supplement LAPD with unarmed response models where appropriate
Clear homeless encampments and move hundreds indoors with services
Introduce motions supporting Governor Newsom's model ordinance on encampments
Support community-informed housing development reflecting Westside character
Prevent homelessness through upstream tenant-assistance programs
campaign_platform.source_note: Campaign site tracipark.com (timed out on direct fetch; content drawn from WebSearch summary and official CD11 press)
